task_description: Create a provider for the z.AI API (using the coding plan API token) and also create a provider for use with OpenRouter.

patterns.provider_pattern: All providers extend abstract AIProvider class with methods: initialize(), chat(), supportsTools(), supportsVision(), destroy()
patterns.dual_mode_pattern: Providers support both direct SDK mode (apiKey) and proxy mode (endpoint) for flexibility
patterns.streaming_pattern: chat() returns AsyncIterableIterator<StreamChunk> yielding content_delta, tool_use_start, tool_use_delta, tool_use, complete, error chunks
patterns.package_pattern: @clippyjs/ai-{provider} naming with peer dependency on @clippyjs/ai workspace:*
patterns.test_pattern: Mock OpenAI SDK in vitest, test initialization modes, feature detection, streaming, and error handling

existing_implementations.description: OpenAIProvider at packages/ai-openai provides complete reference implementation for both new providers

constraints.reuse_openai_sdk: Must use openai npm package ^6.8.1, NOT create new SDK wrappers
constraints.no_new_dependencies: No dependencies beyond what ai-openai uses
constraints.proxy_mode_required: Both providers must support proxy mode for backend usage
constraints.api_key_validation: Validate API key format as warning only, don't block initialization
